description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image and caches the vendor/ruby directory. Include a global before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor for all jobs. Define a rspec job in the test stage that executes rspec spec. The pipeline has no additional stages, artifacts, services, or rules.
